headline: US threatens Switzerland with 12.5% forced-labour tariff; Bern rejects USTR findings, Parmelin urges calm
summary: USTR recommends 12.5% additional tariff on Switzerland and ~60 economies over forced-labour findings; Swiss government and economiesuisse reject it.

headline: Ruag destroys four tonnes of US Army munitions at Altdorf, raising neutrality questions amid Iran war
summary: Swiss state firm Ruag disposes of US troops' expired ammunition; first foreign-military job, contentious after US became Iran-war party.

headline: Daniel Jositsch quits SP after 27 years, will run independent for Council of States 2027
summary: Zurich SP refused renomination 109-94; Jositsch leaves party and group, will run as independent in 2027.

headline: Vaud discloses partial costs of Dittli and bouclier-fiscal affairs; deputies criticise PLR
summary: Canton Vaud reveals some costs of the tax-shield and Dittli scandals; cross-party deputies fault the PLR.

headline: G7 in Evian: Vaud barricades Blecherette police post, Swiss army assists France, Geneva protests
summary: Vaud and Geneva mobilise security for the nearby Evian G7; Swiss soldiers help French forces.

headline: ECtHR rules in Switzerland's favour on military-service exemption tax
summary: European Court of Human Rights decides for Switzerland on the Wehrpflichtersatz exemption levy.

headline: Germany loses UN Security Council seat for first time since 1973
summary: Portugal (134) and Austria (131) beat Germany (104) for Western European UNSC seats; Berlin cites Israel/Ukraine stances.

headline: US House passes Iran war-powers resolution 215-208; Trump calls it unpatriotic, WH says it won't reach his desk
summary: House rebukes Trump on Iran war; four Republicans cross over; Senate has no matching vote.

headline: Israel and Lebanon agree new conditional ceasefire; Israel continues south Lebanon offensive
summary: US-mediated truce demands Hezbollah pullback north of Litani and pilot zones; Israel keeps striking; differs from failed April deal.

headline: Kim Jong Un unveils nuclear fuel facility, orders exponential arsenal expansion
summary: North Korea shows new uranium-enrichment plant; Kim says fissile-material capacity more than doubled in five years.

headline: Israel Supreme Court orders state to allow ICRC visits to Palestinian prisoners
summary: Court reinstates Red Cross access to Palestinian detainees suspended since Oct 2023.

headline: Heavy fighting in Mogadishu as Somalia term extension upends election timeline
summary: Government and opposition militias clash over President Mohamud's one-year term extension; AU/EU/US urge restraint.

headline: CVE-2026-41283: OpenStack Mistral unauthenticated RCE CVSS 9.9
summary: OpenStack Mistral workflow service allows scope-changing remote code execution; fixed in OSSA-2026-020.

headline: CVE-2026-4104: TeknoPass SQL-injection authorization bypass CVSS 9.8
summary: Unauthenticated user-controlled SQL primary key bypasses authorization in TeknoPass; via USOM Turkey.

headline: CVE-2026-10840: OpenShift Pipelines Tekton privilege escalation CVSS 9.6
summary: tekton-scheduler-rolebinding grants system:authenticated write access in Red Hat OpenShift Pipelines.

headline: CVE-2026-41010/41011: Cloud Foundry BOSH command injection via package and job names
summary: String-interpolated tar commands let attacker-named packages/jobs execute commands on the BOSH director.

headline: CVE-2026-49185: Acer FieldX MDM unauthenticated command injection CVSS 10.0
summary: FieldX MDM passes unverified payloads into Runtime.exec(), enabling unauth RCE on the MDM server.

headline: arXiv 2606.04284: Sparse MoE reward models learn interpretable specialized experts
summary: Sparse mixture-of-experts reward model yields interpretable, personalizable preference dimensions for RLHF.

headline: arXiv 2606.04503: Efficient RLVR for reasoning via tracing metacognitive pivots
summary: Selects informative unlabeled samples for RLVR by tracing reasoning-trajectory pivots.

headline: arXiv 2606.04050: LiftQuant continuous bit-width LLM quantization
summary: Continuous effective bit-widths via dimensional lifting/projection for Pareto-optimal memory budgets.

headline: arXiv 2606.04678: LARM depth-conditioned looped Transformer for ASR test-time compute
summary: Recurrent depth as a controllable test-time compute axis for speech recognition without bigger models.

headline: arXiv 2606.04634: Explainably Safe Reinforcement Learning
summary: Represents RL safety shields as decision trees to keep formal guarantees while making logic interpretable.
